name: Elon Musk
summary: First thing on the agenda: improve everything
summaryEn: First thing on the agenda: improve everything
analysis: 这条还不算定论，但值得继续跟，看它会不会从一个观点长成真实、稳定、可复用的需求。很多好机会，最早都长得像一句半成型的判断。

name: Elon Musk
summary:
Try Tesla self-driving!
Just squeezing through
summaryEn:
Try Tesla self-driving!
Just squeezing through
analysis: 现在还不能下结论，但它已经露出一点苗头，值得继续观察后续有没有真实需求接住。能不能被反复使用，决定了它是灵感还是产品。

name: Garry Tan
summary:
I guess you expect politicians to be two-faced but you would hope someone who at least made some stuff in tech to not be like that
Not so lucky here
You asked me for an intro to Garry like 8 months ago. I guess you didn't get what you wanted so now it's time to attack, huh?
summaryEn:
I guess you expect politicians to be two-faced but you would hope someone who at least made some stuff in tech to not be like that
Not so lucky here
You asked me for an intro to Garry like 8 months ago. I guess you didn't get what you wanted so now it's time to attack, huh?
analysis: 眼下更像一个信号而非结论，关键看它后面会不会演化成可持续的用户需求。真正值得下注的，通常不是热度，而是复用频率。

name: Garry Tan
summary:
Saikat hates startups and would do whatever he can to destroy the ability for people to start startups in San Francisco and California
He himself is an early Stripe centimillionaire, so this is the worst form of pulling up the ladder you could possibly imagine
Craven
summaryEn:
Saikat hates startups and would do whatever he can to destroy the ability for people to start startups in San Francisco and California
He himself is an early Stripe centimillionaire, so this is the worst form of pulling up the ladder you could possibly imagine
Craven
analysis: 真正拉开差距的，往往不是模型本身，而是支付、集成、部署这些最影响交付效率的脏活。越靠近生产环境，越能看出基础设施的重要性。

name: Nikunj Kothari
summary:
Priority given to the founders with the funniest response.
Link to RSVP here:
summaryEn:
Priority given to the founders with the funniest response.
Link to RSVP here:
analysis: 这条还不算定论，但值得继续跟，看它会不会从一个观点长成真实、稳定、可复用的需求。很多好机会，最早都长得像一句半成型的判断。

name: Nikunj Kothari
summary:
I'm generally quite low key when it comes to events. But when
@andruyeung
 comes to town, you ball out..
Excited to cohost a VERY fancy founder dinner on April 7th in SF.
We already have some fantastic founders coming & would love to add a few more.
RSVP link in the next post!
summaryEn:
I'm generally quite low key when it comes to events. But when
@andruyeung
 comes to town, you ball out..
Excited to cohost a VERY fancy founder dinner on April 7th in SF.
We already have some fantastic founders coming & would love to add a few more.
RSVP link in the next post!
analysis: 生成式 UI 不只是新花样，它开始改写产品交互和工作流边界，背后是软件形态在变。用户未来面对的，可能不再是固定页面，而是按任务实时长出来的界面。

name: danshipper
analysis: 现在还不能下结论，但它已经露出一点苗头，值得继续观察后续有没有真实需求接住。能不能被反复使用，决定了它是灵感还是产品。

name: Nan Yu
summary:
If you were a technical co-founder or similar in a past life and you want to PM the future of software development come join us.
We are hiring for PM and Eng at @linear
https://
linear.app/careers
PMs. We are especially interested if you were a technical co-founder or played a si...
summaryEn:
If you were a technical co-founder or similar in a past life and you want to PM the future of software development come join us.
We are hiring for PM and Eng at @linear
https://
linear.app/careers
PMs. We are especially interested if you were a technical co-founder or played a si...
analysis: 这类想法最有意思的地方，是它在推动界面从固定页面走向按任务即时生成。界面如果会跟着目标变化，软件就更像一个可编排的流程层。

name: Nan Yu
summary:
Put more bluntly, many designers I've worked with care more about the opinions of other designers than of their users.
If you had to choose
1. designers think you're cool, but low usage
2. heavy usage, other designers think its lame
which one do you choose? every PM picks 2
I’ll...
summaryEn:
Put more bluntly, many designers I've worked with care more about the opinions of other designers than of their users.
If you had to choose
1. designers think you're cool, but low usage
2. heavy usage, other designers think its lame
which one do you choose? every PM picks 2
I’ll...
analysis: 一旦生成式 UI 跑通，很多产品竞争会从“功能多少”转向“工作流是否更自然”。看起来像设计问题，本质上其实是产品架构问题。

name: OpenAI
summary: More on our approach to the Model Spec:
summaryEn: More on our approach to the Model Spec:
analysis: 这更像模型路线信号，重点不在这次功能本身，而在后续资源和能力会往哪里倾斜。模型团队每次公开表态，其实都在提前给生态做预告。

name: OpenAI
summary:
Listen to the OpenAI Podcast on—
Spotify
https://

KMh3aTxnGLENP

analysis: 分发能力正在变成产品本身，能持续触达并留住用户的团队，会越来越占优势。对 AI 产品来说，能不能形成重复触达，常常比一次爆发更重要。

name: claudeai
summary:
Your work tools in Claude are now available on mobile.
Explore Figma designs, create Canva slides, check Amplitude dashboards, all from your phone.
Give it a try:
http://
claude.com/download
summaryEn:
Your work tools in Claude are now available on mobile.
Explore Figma designs, create Canva slides, check Amplitude dashboards, all from your phone.
Give it a try:
http://
claude.com/download
analysis: 与其把它当作一次产品更新，不如把它看成模型团队在提前释放路线方向。真正该盯的是哪些能力会先被产品化、先被推到用户面前。

name: Yihui
summary:
转发一下这次更新。
MkAnime 现在已经支持 Kling 3.0 了。
我自己的实际感受是，多对象参考模式对 15 秒视频真的很有帮助，分镜制作难度降了不少，整个流程会顺很多。
当然，问题也很直接：贵。
如果你预算够，想尽可能减少分镜工作量，这个能力很值。
但如果你想控制成本，其实也可以直接用
Update: MkAnime now supports Kling 3.0.
You can generate 15-second videos with multi-reference mode, which dramatically reduces st...

You can generate 15-second videos with multi-reference mode, which dramatically reduces st...
analysis: 这条还不算定论，但值得继续跟，看它会不会从一个观点长成真实、稳定、可复用的需求。很多好机会，最早都长得像一句半成型的判断。

name: Yihui
summary: 夸早了，是一张图片，不能编辑还是有点蛋疼
summaryEn: 夸早了，是一张图片，不能编辑还是有点蛋疼
analysis: 现在还不能下结论，但它已经露出一点苗头，值得继续观察后续有没有真实需求接住。能不能被反复使用，决定了它是灵感还是产品。

name: levie
summary:
Jevons paradox is happening in real time. Companies, especially outside of tech, are realizing that they can now afford to take on software projects that they wouldn’t have been able to tackle before because now AI lets them do so.
We’re going to start to use software for all
Eng...
summaryEn:
Jevons paradox is happening in real time. Companies, especially outside of tech, are realizing that they can now afford to take on software projects that they wouldn’t have been able to tackle before because now AI lets them do so.
We’re going to start to use software for all
Eng...
analysis: 这更像需求结构在变，不只是做了个新功能，而是产品优先级和用户预期都在重排。很多时候，用户真正要的并不是更多功能，而是更少阻力。

name: Hwwaanng
summary:
先做，有人用再改。
有人用，就有人给你改，反正大家都有 Agent。
summaryEn:
先做，有人用再改。
有人用，就有人给你改，反正大家都有 Agent。
analysis: 这句话点中了现在很多 AI 产品的真实节奏: 第一版变便宜了，真正慢的反而是等用户反馈和迭代方向。Agent 把试错成本压低后，速度优势会更多来自上线后的调整能力。

name: Oran Ge
summary:
Agent 使用浏览器的最佳实践，发布之后立即获得 1000 stars：
Web Access
它把 Agent 上网的各种痛点都解决了：
- 用搜索替代浏览，获取不全的信息
- 访问微信公众号、小红书每次都需要重新登录
- 使用浏览器的时候和人类用户抢浏览器
- 使用单线程，缓慢，低效
summaryEn:
Agent 使用浏览器的最佳实践，发布之后立即获得 1000 stars：
Web Access
它把 Agent 上网的各种痛点都解决了：
- 用搜索替代浏览，获取不全的信息
- 访问微信公众号、小红书每次都需要重新登录
- 使用浏览器的时候和人类用户抢浏览器
- 使用单线程，缓慢，低效
analysis: 很多人以为 agent 上网只是“加个搜索”就够了，但真正进生产环境后，卡的都是登录、并发和浏览器资源抢占。这个方向一旦跑通，浏览器层会成为 agent 基础设施的重要一环。

name: Oran Ge
summary:
Sora 死了
群友问到
那些套壳 Sora 的 Agent 要怎么办？
summaryEn:
Sora 死了
群友问到
那些套壳 Sora 的 Agent 要怎么办？
analysis: 这句看着像调侃，实则是在提醒一件老问题: 只套单一上游模型的产品，生命周期往往跟着模型热度走。真要活下来，护城河还是得落在工作流、数据或分发，而不是模型名气本身。

name: Zara Zhang
summary:
GitHub is the new Substack
Code is a form of self-expression
summaryEn:
GitHub is the new Substack
Code is a form of self-expression
analysis: 这句话抓住了一个很新的变化: 代码仓库正在变成内容分发面。过去写作者靠文章建立风格，现在 builder 直接用 repo、demo 和 commit 记录表达判断，代码本身就在说话。

name: Peter Yang
summary:
Nooo they can't talk to each other? Come on
@telegram
summaryEn:
Nooo they can't talk to each other? Come on
@telegram
analysis: 这条吐槽指向的是 agent 协作层还很原始。单个 bot 能工作已经不稀奇了，下一步真正有价值的是让不同 agent 在同一消息流里自然接力，而不是各自单打独斗。

name: Peter Yang
summary: My Telegram is just chats with my OpenClaw and now Claude bots. Haven't talked to a single human yet.
summaryEn: My Telegram is just chats with my OpenClaw and now Claude bots. Haven't talked to a single human yet.
analysis: Telegram 官方这些年一直把 bot、Mini App、支付都做成平台能力，所以这条吐槽其实挺有启发: 一旦 bot 之间能更自然协作，聊天应用就不只是聊天入口，而会逐步变成 agent 的轻量操作系统。

name: Turing Ou
summary: oh my god，我想到一个方法把 m0rphic 重构成 variant 那样可以无限抽卡的生成式 UI 产品，以非常低的成本还可以结合 nkmc 嵌入真实的业务数据而不仅仅是 placebolder！
summaryEn: oh my god，我想到一个方法把 m0rphic 重构成 variant 那样可以无限抽卡的生成式 UI 产品，以非常低的成本还可以结合 nkmc 嵌入真实的业务数据而不仅仅是 placebolder！
analysis: 当生成式 UI 不再只是占位 demo，而能直接挂真实业务数据时，产品形态就开始变了。未来用户买的可能不只是功能集合，而是一个会随任务重组的界面层。

name: 今日总结
summary: 今天共追踪到 14 位 builder 的 23 条动态。Agent 正从 demo 走向真实工作流；模型厂商持续向外释放路线信号；内容、社群和分发继续绑定；整体看，竞争重点正从单点模型能力，转向工作流整合、分发效率和更快的商业化闭环。
summaryEn: 今天共追踪到 14 位 builder 的 23 条动态。Agent 正从 demo 走向真实工作流；模型厂商持续向外释放路线信号；内容、社群和分发继续绑定；整体看，竞争重点正从单点模型能力，转向工作流整合、分发效率和更快的商业化闭环。
